Spring Data Couchbase
  1. org.springframework.data.couchbase.core.mapping.event
  2. CouchbaseMappingEvent

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.couchbase.core.mapping.event.CouchbaseMappingEvent

Packages that use CouchbaseMappingEvent
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.couchbase.core
This package contains the specific implementations and core classes for Spring Data Couchbase internals.
org.springframework.data.couchbase.core.mapping.event
This package contains various events that are emitted during the lifecycle of a Spring Data entity.
